title: ischaemum barbatum var. gibbum
intro: Ischaemum barbatum var. gibbum, also known as Japanese Millet or Japanese Brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Ischaemum barbatum var. gibbum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
